my_thoughts: Turn 2: 'I’m not being fair. After all, you have been really helpful.'. Student now in placating. Continuing with none approach. Building on previous turn's foundation.
accumulated_insight: T2: Student: 'I’m not being fair. After all, you have been really helpful.'. Shift from guilty_retreat to placating. Teacher applies none mechanism with validates trigger, blocks self attack. Mid-episode progression in UNMAKING phase.
visible_response:
And yet we see you feel angry because I didn’t help you last time.
If we don’t turn the criticism back onto you, can we take a look at this anger toward me?
